title: An Act relative to consumer connected devices

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Brownsberger and Mr.Rogers of Cambridge, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 3090) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of William N. Brownsberger and David M. Rogers for legislation relative to consumer connected devices.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.
